/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/rvault.dir/src/source/rvault_random.c.o CMakeFiles/rvault.dir/src/source/rvault_crypto.c.o CMakeFiles/rvault.dir/src/source/rvault_auth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvault.dir/src/source/rvault_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvault.dir/src/source/rvault_platform.c.o CMakeFiles/rvault.dir/src/source/rvault_file.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvault.dir/src/source/rvault_session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvault.dir/src/source/rvault_exception.cpp.o CMakeFiles/rvault.dir/src/source/rvault_ui.cpp.o -o rvault  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsodium.so
